name: session_menu_redesign
description: S5.I -- verify the redesigned Session menu loads cleanly. The old `Reset Conversation` action was removed; the new menu carries New Tab (Ctrl+T) / Close Tab (Ctrl+W) / Rename Active Tab... / Saved Sessions / Compact Context / Clean Up Old Sessions / Manage Sessions. We exercise the New Tab item via Alt+S, N (the menu-letter accelerator) and verify the notebook still renders, then dismiss the menu and quit. This catches a regression where the menu bar fails to install or the new entries collide with old accelerator ids.
